ValidationRule.description:
With this rule:
A candidate cannot change any shift timing fields if:
- The shift has both Actual Start and Actual End - And the shift has been Approved
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $Profile.Name = "Alliance Connect User", OR( ISCHANGED(sirenum__Actual_Start_Time__c), ISCHANGED(sirenum__Actual_End_Time__c), ISCHANGED(sirenum__BreakStartTime__c), ISCHANGED(sirenum__Break_Length__c), ISCHANGED(tc9_ext_sirint__Second_Break_Start_Time__c), ISCHANGED(tc9_ext_sirint__Second_Break_Length__c) ), AND( NOT(ISBLANK(sirenum__Approved_By_Client__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED(sirenum__Approved_By_Client__c)) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are not allowed to update Actual Start/End Time or Break fields.
